title: THE ARC REUSE & RECYCLING CENTER - 211info
text: ARC PORTLAND METRO THE ARC REUSE & RECYCLING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a donation site accepting clothing, shoes, linens/bedding, jewelry, watches, musical instruments, personal electronics, media, toys, home goods, recreational and camping gear, computers and related equipment, and small furniture items. 6929 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Thursday-Monday 9am-4pm Email (503) 223-7279 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 223-7279 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Hood River, Multnomah, Wasco, Washington, and Yamhill Counties Services: Donation Drop Off Points Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING APPROACHES - SUPPORT AND PROGRAMS FOR INDIVIDUALS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CLUB IMPACT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
